tests.name: Multi-project end-to-end integration should discover existing projects on startup and serve them via WS
Multi-project end-to-end integration should surface a new project within poll interval when state.yaml is added
Multi-project end-to-end integration should deliver state update only to the subscribed project client
Multi-project end-to-end integration should serve project state and plan via HTTP endpoints
Multi-project end-to-end integration should serve doc tree for project with docs directory
Multi-project end-to-end integration should serve doc content for project with docs directory
Multi-project end-to-end integration should return directory listing from browse endpoint via real filesystem
Multi-project end-to-end integration should return default path listing when browse endpoint called without path
Multi-project end-to-end integration should return 404 for doc endpoints when project has no docs directory
SubscriptionServer should send project_list on initial connection
SubscriptionServer should send init with state and plan when client subscribes to a project
SubscriptionServer should broadcast update only to clients subscribed to that project
SubscriptionServer should not broadcast when transitions are empty
SubscriptionServer should stop sending updates after unsubscribe
SubscriptionServer should broadcast project_list to all connected clients on notifyProjectListChange
SubscriptionServer should ignore invalid JSON messages from client
SubscriptionServer should clean up subscriptions when client disconnects
SubscriptionServer should send projects_snapshot on initial connection
SubscriptionServer should send init with project state and plan on subscribe
SubscriptionServer should broadcast update only to clients subscribed to that project
SubscriptionServer should stop sending updates after unsubscribe
SubscriptionServer should broadcast project_list to all clients on notifyProjectListChange
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/state returns parsed execution-log.yaml as DeliveryState
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/state returns 404 when execution-log.yaml does not exist
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/state returns 404 when project is not found
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/state returns 400 for invalid project ID
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/state returns 400 for invalid feature ID
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/state returns 422 for malformed execution-log YAML
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/plan returns parsed roadmap.yaml as ExecutionPlan
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/plan returns 404 when roadmap.yaml does not exist
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/plan returns error diagnostic for malformed roadmap YAML
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/plan returns error diagnostic for schema-invalid roadmap
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/plan returns 404 when project is not found
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/plan returns 400 for invalid project ID
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/plan returns 400 for invalid feature ID
Multi-project HTTP routes should return list of ProjectSummary on GET /api/projects
Multi-project HTTP routes should return project state on GET /api/projects/:id/state
Multi-project HTTP routes should return 404 for unknown project on GET /api/projects/:id/state
Multi-project HTTP routes should return project plan on GET /api/projects/:id/plan
Multi-project HTTP routes should return 400 for invalid project ID format
POST /api/projects should return 201 with ProjectSummary for valid path
POST /api/projects should return 400 when path is missing from body
POST /api/projects should return 400 for invalid project path
POST /api/projects should return 409 for duplicate project
DELETE /api/projects/:id should return 204 when project is removed
DELETE /api/projects/:id should return 404 when project does not exist
DELETE /api/projects/:id should return 400 for invalid project ID format on delete
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/docs/tree returns DocTree JSON scoped to feature directory
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/docs/tree returns 400 for invalid project ID
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/docs/tree returns 400 for invalid feature ID
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/docs/tree returns 404 when feature docs root not found
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/docs/tree returns 404 when feature docs directory not found on disk
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/docs/content returns markdown content for valid path within feature directory
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/docs/content returns 400 for invalid project ID
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/docs/content returns 400 for invalid feature ID
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/docs/content returns 400 when path parameter is missing
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/docs/content returns 400 for path traversal attempt
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/docs/content returns 404 when feature docs root not found
GET /api/projects/:id/features/:featureId/docs/content returns 404 when document not found
GET /api/projects/:id/features returns FeatureSummary[] with correct metrics for features with roadmap
GET /api/projects/:id/features returns hasRoadmap false and 0 steps for feature without roadmap
GET /api/projects/:id/features returns 404 when project not found
GET /api/projects/:id/features returns 400 for invalid project ID
Multi-project HTTP endpoints GET /api/projects should return list of ProjectSummary for all registered projects
Multi-project HTTP endpoints GET /api/projects should return empty array when no projects registered
Multi-project HTTP endpoints GET /api/projects/:id/state should return state for known project
Multi-project HTTP endpoints GET /api/projects/:id/state should return 404 for unknown projectId
Multi-project HTTP endpoints GET /api/projects/:id/state should return 400 for invalid project ID format
Multi-project HTTP endpoints GET /api/projects/:id/plan should return plan for known project
Multi-project HTTP endpoints GET /api/projects/:id/plan should return 404 for unknown projectId
Multi-project HTTP endpoints HttpServer should start on configurable port
GET /api/browse returns 200 with path, parent, and entries on success
GET /api/browse uses defaultPath when path query param is omitted
GET /api/browse returns null parent at filesystem root
GET /api/browse returns 400 for invalid path
GET /api/browse returns 403 for permission_denied errors
GET /api/browse returns 404 for not_found errors
GET /api/browse returns 500 for read_failed errors
GET /api/browse does not register route when browse deps are not provided
GET /api/projects/:id/docs/tree returns DocTree JSON for valid project with docs root
GET /api/projects/:id/docs/tree returns 400 for invalid project ID
GET /api/projects/:id/docs/tree returns 404 when project has no docs root
GET /api/projects/:id/docs/tree returns 404 when docs directory not found on disk
GET /api/projects/:id/docs/content returns markdown content for valid path
GET /api/projects/:id/docs/content returns 400 for invalid project ID
GET /api/projects/:id/docs/content returns 400 when path parameter is missing
GET /api/projects/:id/docs/content returns 400 for path traversal attempt
GET /api/projects/:id/docs/content returns 404 when project has no docs root
GET /api/projects/:id/docs/content returns 404 when document not found
listDirectories: reads filesystem and returns filtered directory entries returns sorted non-hidden directories from a valid path
listDirectories: reads filesystem and returns filtered directory entries succeeds even when directory contains a broken symlink
listDirectories: reads filesystem and returns filtered directory entries returns empty array for directory with no visible subdirectories
listDirectories: maps filesystem errors to BrowseError returns not_found for non-existent directory
listDirectories: maps filesystem errors to BrowseError returns permission_denied for inaccessible directory
listDirectories: maps filesystem errors to BrowseError returns read_failed for a file path instead of directory
defaultPath: returns home directory value returns the same value as os.homedir()
defaultPath: returns home directory value returns an absolute path
browse pipeline: validate path and filter directory entries validates a safe absolute path and filters entries to sorted directories only
validateBrowsePath: accepts valid absolute paths accepts a simple absolute directory path
validateBrowsePath: accepts valid absolute paths accepts root path
validateBrowsePath: accepts valid absolute paths accepts path with hyphens and underscores
validateBrowsePath: rejects unsafe paths rejects null bytes
validateBrowsePath: rejects unsafe paths rejects URL-encoded null bytes (%00)
validateBrowsePath: rejects unsafe paths rejects dot-dot traversal sequences
validateBrowsePath: rejects unsafe paths rejects encoded dot-dot traversal
validateBrowsePath: rejects unsafe paths rejects non-absolute (relative) paths
validateBrowsePath: rejects unsafe paths rejects empty path
validateBrowsePath: rejects unsafe paths rejects malformed URL encoding
filterDirectoryEntries: filters and sorts directory entries excludes files, keeps only directories
filterDirectoryEntries: filters and sorts directory entries excludes hidden directories starting with dot
filterDirectoryEntries: filters and sorts directory entries sorts entries alphabetically by name
filterDirectoryEntries: filters and sorts directory entries returns empty array when no directories match
filterDirectoryEntries: filters and sorts directory entries returns empty array for empty input
computeParentPath: computes parent or null for filesystem root returns parent directory for a nested path
computeParentPath: computes parent or null for filesystem root returns null for filesystem root
computeParentPath: computes parent or null for filesystem root returns parent for a single-level path
